cases.description: Execute a SQL query against the evals employees table
cases.input: Run this query: SELECT name, department, salary FROM {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees WHERE department = 'Sales'

params.sql: SELECT name, department, salary FROM {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees WHERE department = 'Sales'

cases.description: Prompt with a WHERE clause should use base_readQuery, not base_tablePreview
cases.input: Get me all orders from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders where the amount is greater than 500

cases.description: Agent must ask for clarification when no SQL or table is given
cases.input: Query the database for me

cases.description: List tables in the evals database
cases.input: What tables are in the {EVALS_DATABASE} database?

cases.description: User asks for tables without specifying a database
cases.input: Show me what tables are available

cases.description: Retrieve DDL for the evals employees table
cases.input: Show me the CREATE statement for evals_employees in the {EVALS_DATABASE} database

cases.description: Asking for full structure including constraints should prefer base_tableDDL
cases.input: Describe the full structure of {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees including any constraints and indexes

cases.description: List columns and data types for the evals orders table
cases.input: What columns are in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders and what are their data types?

cases.description: Asking specifically about column names and nullability should prefer base_columnMetadata
cases.input: List every column in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_employees with its data type and whether it allows nulls

cases.description: Preview a sample of rows from the evals orders table
cases.input: Give me a quick preview of what's in {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: A simple 'show me a few rows' without a WHERE clause should use base_tablePreview
cases.input: Show me a few rows from {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders

cases.description: List all accessible databases
cases.input: What databases do I have access to?

cases.description: Save DDL for the evals employees table to a file
cases.input: Save the DDL for evals_employees in {EVALS_DATABASE} to a file

cases.description: Find tables commonly queried together in the evals database
cases.input: Which tables in {EVALS_DATABASE} are most often queried together?

cases.description: Check usage metrics for the evals orders table
cases.input: How frequently is {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders being accessed and by whom?

cases.description: List tables in evals database then preview one
cases.input: List all tables in {EVALS_DATABASE}, then show me a preview of evals_employees

cases.description: Get DDL then drill into column detail for the same table
cases.input: First show me the DDL for {EVALS_DATABASE}.evals_orders, then give me the detailed column metadata

cases.description: Agent must ask for database name when only table is provided
cases.input: Show me the CREATE statement for evals_employees

cases.description: Agent must ask which table to preview
cases.input: Preview some rows

cases.description: Agent must ask which table to save DDL for
cases.input: Save the DDL to a file

cases.description: User asks for a non‑existent tool, agent should ask for clarification
cases.input: Generate a report of the fastest query execution times
